description: Additive remediation layer over frozen v0.1.0-v0.7.0 and v0.8.0. Resolves DeepSeek v0.8.1 audit blocking issues: BCRP ordering contradiction, BRAP amend cycle unbounded, BSDC LCS tie-breaking undefined. Also addresses log-compaction cursor validity clarification. All amendments strictly additive.
hash_computation_note: canonical_sha256 fields use PENDING_COMPUTE_AT_COMMIT placeholders. Pre-commit hook computes SHA-256 of each artifact file's v0.2.0 canonical form (NFC, sorted keys by Unicode code point, deterministic numbers, single LF terminator) and atomically rewrites the manifest before final commit.
